data.text/markdown: No strides to plot.
Ad-hoc SQL

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='TqIu-0' random-id='d98cea70-9188-3bcf-4927-50705905350f'><marimo-text-area data-initial-value='"SELECT trial_name, dof_name, ROUND(AVG(pos), 4) AS mean_pos\nFROM kinematics k\nJOIN subjects s ON k.subject_id = s.subject_id\nWHERE s.study = 'Carter2023_Formatted_With_Arm'\n  AND dof_name IN ('knee_angle_l', 'knee_angle_r')\nGROUP BY trial_name, dof_name\nLIMIT 50"' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eSQL\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-placeholder='""' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-rows='10'></marimo-text-area></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='Vxnm-0' random-id='11a752c1-1673-d00d-1054-c7eee3abfdba'><marimo-button data-initial-value='0' data-label='"\u003cspan class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"paragraph\"\u003eRun query\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e"' data-kind='"neutral"' data-disabled='false' data-full-width='false'></marimo-button></marimo-ui-element>
